pipeline.verificationNotes:
Acceptance criteria check FAILED — 25/25 AC incomplete:

### Merge origin/main into feature/pan-2214, prune duplicates per PRD landed table, re-prove gates (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given the completed item, `git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/main HEAD` exits 0 — the branch contains all of current main with no rebase or force-push
  - [ ] Given the merged branch, When npx vitest run executes the four previously-failing sentinel suites (deacon-swarm-synthesis, foreman-swarm, auto-resume-gating, synced-skills), Then vitest exits 0 with zero failed tests
  - [ ] Given the merged branch, When npm run typecheck and npm run lint execute, Then both exit 0
  - [ ] The merged deacon-swarm.ts preserves exactly one implementation each of the gc liveness guard and dispatch-eligibility gating (main's) alongside the branch's per-spawn freeze gate and bounded allocator — proven by deacon-swarm-gc, deacon-swarm-hold, and deacon-swarm-dispatch suites passing

### FR-12: per-issue async mutex serializing .pan/records read-modify-write (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given two concurrent updateIssueRecordForIssue calls for the same issue, When both resolve, Then the test's execution-order log proves the second rebuild started only after the first's write completed
  - [ ] Given swarm.slotAssignments written via writeIssueRecordForWorkspaceSync while a rebuild is in flight, When the rebuild completes, Then the final record preserves the slot assignments (PAN-1791 wipe regression)
  - [ ] Given concurrent updateIssueRecordForIssue calls for two different issues, Then their critical sections overlap in the order log — the mutex is per-issue, not global
  - [ ] writeIssueRecordSync and writeIssueRecordForWorkspaceSync remain synchronous functions (no signature change), and each carries the never-split-by-await invariant comment

### FR-13: done-without-signal detection in classifyInFlightSlots, gated by swarm.infer_completion (5/5 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given infer_completion='nudge' and a live slot idle past threshold with commits ahead and a clean worktree, Then classifyInFlightSlots emits exactly one nudge action containing `pan done` and does not repeat it on the next unchanged observation
  - [ ] Given infer_completion='auto' and the done-signature holding across a second consecutive idle expiry, Then the slot classifies ready-to-merge and the action log contains a `signal: inferred` marker
  - [ ] Given infer_completion='off', Then classification output preserves current behavior for the same inputs (running/stalled only, no nudges, no inference)
  - [ ] Given a dirty slot worktree OR zero commits ahead, Then no nudge fires and no inference happens regardless of mode — the slot falls back to the existing stalled classification
  - [ ] Given the new completion-inference suite, When it runs, Then it exits 0 driving all timing through fake timers or the injected `now` option — no real-clock waits appear in the tests

### FR-14: pan swarm reset retires dead slot agent records via removeAgentSync (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given a reset where slot agents are stopped/pause-gated with no live tmux session, Then swarmResetCommand calls removeAgentSync for each and the summary output names the retired agent ids
  - [ ] Given a slot agent whose tmux session is alive, Then reset never calls removeAgentSync for it and reports it as skipped
  - [ ] Retirement preserves JSONL transcripts — the test asserts removal goes through the injected removeAgentSync dep and no transcript path is unlinked
  - [ ] A second reset run with nothing left to retire exits 0 with a no-op summary (idempotent), and the pan-swarm SKILL.md documents record retirement in the same commit (lint passes)

### FR-15: swarm-aware feedback target resolver replaces hardcoded agent-<issue> delivery (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given a swarm issue with live slot agents and no whole-issue agent, When test-failure feedback is delivered, Then messageAgent receives the slot agent id (agent-<issue>-slot-N), not agent-<issue>
  - [ ] Given opts.itemId matching a slot assignment with a live session, Then the resolver returns that specific slot agent rather than an arbitrary live slot
  - [ ] Given no whole-issue agent and no live slot agents, Then delivery emits a needs-you operator notification carrying the undelivered reason and never returns silently
  - [ ] Given a normal single-agent issue with agent-<issue> running, Then delivery behavior is unchanged (messageAgent receives agent-<issue>)

### FR-16: state-derived verification gates never silently reset a passed review verdict (4/4 incomplete)
  - [ ] Given reviewStatus='passed' and the vbrief-ac gate finding incomplete ACs, Then verification records verificationStatus='failed' while reviewStatus remains 'passed'
  - [ ] Given that held-verdict case, Then a needs-you operator notification is emitted naming the vbrief-ac gate and the incomplete-AC cause
  - [ ] Given a code-gate failure (typecheck/lint/test), Then the existing requeue behavior is preserved and the reviewStatus transition carries its reason in verificationNotes
  - [ ] Given vbrief-ac failing while reviewStatus is not 'passed', Then no needs-you notification fires (normal retry feedback only)
